name: Round Banana Twist Basket with Lid - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your home beautifully organized with this Round Banana Twist Basket with Lid from Brightroom™. Handcrafted from banana bark, this round basket offers ample room to stow away anything from your kids' toys to throw blankets or magazines with ease. Plus, it comes with a lid to help keep your items nicely contained and covered.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
